innateAbility.name: Supernatural
innateAbility.description: Grants bonus spell damage amplification stacks each time Muerta kills an enemy hero or within the death radius, and loses a portion of stacks upon death.

abilities.name: Dead Shot
abilities.description: Fires a ghostly trickshot at an enemy unit or tree.Upon impact, it damages and applies a movement speed slow, the bullet then ricochets in the vector-targeted direction.

abilities.name: The Calling
abilities.description: Summons a group of revenants that slowly circle the area-targeted location.Applies a movement speed slow to affected enemy units within the radius.

abilities.name: Gunslinger
abilities.description: When enabled, Muerta's attacks have a chance to fire a second shot at another enemy unit on the same attack.

abilities.name: Spectral Slug
abilities.description: Applies a knockback, damages, slows, and turns the unit-targeted enemy Ethereal.

abilities.name: Pierce the Veil
abilities.description: Transforms into her Corporeal Form, Muerta is now Ethereal and is immune to all physical damage instances.Grants bonus base attack damage and phase movement.

talents.right: +3% The Calling Self Max Health Regen
